decoration: minimal — one or two subtle shapes
hero_layout: card-style — hero content inside a floating card/panel
nav_style: minimal floating — small pill in corner
scroll_animation: minimal — subtle fade-up on sections (CSS only, short delay)
contact_style: map-themed — as if marking your location
border_radius: pill — fully rounded on small elements
color_scheme: mixed — alternating dark and light sections
bonus_quirk: footer includes a tiny randomly chosen emoji that changes daily
